arts.ttl: Lazio Monitoring Bundesliga Star as They Look Bolster Full-Back Department
arts.sum: Lazio are reportedly aiming to strengthen their full-back department in the summer, and one of their options could be Omar Traore. New Right-Back Needed The Biancocelesti hit the jackpot by signing Nuno Tavares from Arsenal last summer, but the rest of the department doesn’t inspire much confidence. arts.ttl: Marco Baroni Chooses Lazio Striker for Venezia Clash; Possible Surprise at the Back
arts.sum: Lazio coach Marco Baroni has reportedly decided who will fill in for the injured Taty Castellanos against Venezia. The Background The Biancocelesti will be looking to garner three points on the road when they take on the struggling Venetians on Saturday.
